findings.title: AWS access key hardcoded in upload widget
findings.evidence: The raw diff adds `const AWS_ACCESS_KEY = "AKIAJW6PNQ4R7TLZ5KYM";` and passes it to `uploadDirect`; Diff Drift reports this as a high-severity hardcoded secret.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v3. Blind subagent: packet-only context; severity-scored prompt.
